testcase.name: Checking Update Details Tab should check that new Details are saved successfully
testcase.classname: should check that new Details are saved successfully

testsuite.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Multiple Consumables to purchase
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Multiple Consumables to purchase

testcase.name: Check different types of Shipping Methods should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Hardware with CoverPlus to purchase
testcase.classname: should check Shipping Method "Standard" when add Hardware with CoverPlus to purchase

testcase.name: Checking Address Book Tab should check negative testcases while creating new Address
testcase.classname: should check negative testcases while creating new Address

testcase.name: Checking Address Book Tab should edit created before Address and check for changes
testcase.classname: should edit created before Address and check for changes

testcase.name: Checking Address Book Tab should delete created before Address
testcase.classname: should delete created before Address

testsuite.name: Send a message when forgot password

testcase.name: Send a message when forgot password should click Forgot Password btn and assert an alert
testcase.classname: should click Forgot Password btn and assert an alert

testsuite.name: Check Support search page works correctly

testcase.name: Check Support search page works correctly should open Support page and perform search by Product name
testcase.classname: should open Support page and perform search by Product name

testcase.name: Check Support search page works correctly should open Support page and perform search by Serial Number
testcase.classname: should open Support page and perform search by Serial Number

testcase.name: Checking tabs on My Account menu should check that tabs on My account menu is opened and correct ones
testcase.classname: should check that tabs on My account menu is opened and correct ones

testcase.name: Checking tabs on My Account menu should open My Accounts tab and check Inner blocks
testcase.classname: should open My Accounts tab and check Inner blocks

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that filters are working correct for Ink Printer
testcase.classname: should check that filters are working correct for Ink Printer

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that several filters shows correct result for Dot Printer
testcase.classname: should check that several filters shows correct result for Dot Printer

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that filter is working correct for Laser Printer
testcase.classname: should check that filter is working correct for Laser Printer

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that filter is working correct for Laser Printer and clear filter
testcase.classname: should check that filter is working correct for Laser Printer and clear filter

testcase.name: Checking filter for all printers should check that filter is working correct for Label Maker Printers
testcase.classname: should check that filter is working correct for Label Maker Printers

testcase.name: Check Learn More page is opens correctly should open Learn More page for InkJet printers

testsuite.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP

testcase.name: Checking pagination and sorting on PLP "before each" hook for "should check that pagination working correct for PLP"
testcase.classname: "before each" hook for "should check that pagination working correct for PLP"

failure.message:
Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Too many elements found. Found '150', expected '15'.
Because this error occurred during a `before each` hook we are skipping the remaining tests in the current suite: `Checking pagination and sor...`

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Too many elements found. Found '150', expected '15'.
Because this error occurred during a `before each` hook we are skipping the remaining tests in the current suite: `Checking pagination and sor...` at Assertions.checkMainProductsQuantity (https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\integration\tests\05_pagination_sorting.spec.js:1681:59) at Context.eval (https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\integration\tests\05_pagination_sorting.spec.js:3490:22)
